title: Simple Graves
description: Spawns gravestone upon death with all your items and XP. Break to retrieve.
body:
# Simple Graves

Really simple gravestone mod.

This mod adds the gravestone block, which will spawn at your location upon death.

- Instead of your items & XP flying everywhere, they are stored within the gravestone.
- The gravestone will **not** despawn.
- To retrieve, break the gravestone.
- For Fabric.

![Showcase](https://github.com/Speechrezz/simple-graves-mod/blob/main/Showcase.jpg?raw=true)
